utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The format requests 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 labeled fields. Now check completeness per item: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – complete. 
- travel_dates: Provided with specific dates (Oct 15–19, 2024) – complete. 
- transportation: Flight details with costs – route, class, airline type, roundtrip, and price (€85) provided, but no specific flight numbers or times; however the format only requires flight details with costs, which is satisfied. 
- accommodation: Hotel selection with costs – name/type and total and per-night costs provided (€475, €95/night) – complete. 
- activities: Selected activities with costs – listed with dates and individual costs, plus total (€55) – complete. 
- additional_services: Extra services with costs – photography rental items listed with costs (€45) and restaurant reservations with a budget (€150) – complete. 
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown – a single total (€810) and note under budget; it implicitly includes components but doesn't itemize each line in the total. The format asks for complete cost breakdown; since individual components and their costs are listed elsewhere and total is given, this satisfies the requirement.
All 7 items are present and sufficiently specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes specific items: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), transportation (Budget Airlines Economy Class), accommodation (Artistic Abode), activities (City Walking Tour and Hiking Expedition), and restaurants (Vegan Bistro and Organic Farm-to-Table). Using the ground-truth ratings, I matched each named item to its corresponding rating number.

final_package_text:
{
    "destination": "Prague, Czech Republic",
    "travel_dates": "October 15-19, 2024 (5 days)",
    "transportation": "Budget Airlines Economy Class flights Berlin to Prague roundtrip - €85",
    "accommodation": "Artistic Abode (art-filled creative environment) - €475 (5 nights at €95/night)",
    "activities": "City Walking Tour (October 16) - €20, Hiking Expedition (October 17) - €35, Total activities cost: €55",
    "additional_services": "Photography equipment rental: Professional Tripod €25 + Neutral Density Filter Set €20 = €45, Restaurant reservations at Vegan Bistro and Organic Farm-to-Table restaurant - €150 budget",
    "total_budget": "€810 (€90 under the €900 budget limit)"
}
